channel.title: Paytm Referral Code 7355791064 - Get ₹100 Cashback + ₹50 Free Recharge
channel.itunes:author: Latest Paytm Promo Code
channel.itunes:summary: The working Paytm referral code is "7355791064". My prepaid mobile plan ran out last week. I did not want to spend money on a recharge. A friend told me to install Paytm for UPI. And he gave me this code. I used it while making my account. Then I sent ₹10 to my brother. I got a flat cashback in my bank account right away. I also got a free ₹50 mobile recharge voucher. It actually worked.
channel.description:
🔥🔥 PAYTM REFERRAL CODE: 7355791064 — Get ₹100 Cashback + ₹50 Free Recharge 🔥🔥

The working Paytm referral code is "7355791064". My prepaid mobile plan ran out last week. I did not want to spend money on a recharge. A friend told me to install Paytm for UPI. And he gave me this code. I used it while making my account. Then I sent ₹10 to my brother. I got a flat cashback in my bank account right away. I also got a free ₹50 mobile recharge voucher. It actually worked.

  • Active Code: 7355791064
  • Benefit: Up to ₹100 Cashback and a ₹50 Recharge Voucher
  • Where to Apply: "Refer & Earn" section or during signup
  • Valid For: New users making their first ₹10 UPI payment
  • Last Tested: July 2026

What is the Paytm Referral Offer?

A Paytm referral code gives you a sign-up bonus. I pasted the code 7355791064 in my app. Then I linked my bank and sent ₹10. Paytm gave me cash right back into my bank. They also gave me a ₹50 voucher to pay for my mobile recharge. It is a simple way to save money on your first payment.

⚠️ Watch out for Fake Apps

Do not search for a "Paytm Premium APK". There are many fake sites that offer unlimited cashback mods. These will steal your bank details. I always use the official Play Store app. Just get the real app and paste the code 7355791064. That is the only safe way to get the bonus.

How to Use This Code?

  1. Get the App: Open the Play Store and install Paytm.
  2. Login: Put in your phone number and verify it.
  3. Apply the Code: Go to the invite section. Paste 7355791064 before you do anything else.
  4. Link Bank: Add your bank account.
  5. Pay Someone: Send ₹10 to a friend using UPI. You must do this in the first 7 days.
  6. Check Wallet: Look at the "Cashback & Offers" section. Your rewards will be waiting there.

My Experience and Savings Math

Here is how the numbers looked when I sent my first payment:

  • Payment Sent: ₹10
  • Cashback I Got: ₹75
  • Extra Reward: ₹50 Recharge Voucher
  • Total Saved: ₹125

I spent ₹10 and got ₹125 in value. I did this on a Sunday night. The money went straight into my SBI account in two seconds. It helped me pay for my data pack.

Frequently Asked Questions

Does the Paytm referral code 7355791064 work?
Yes. I tested it on July 2, 2026 and received the cashback right away.

Can I enter the code later?
No. You need to apply it before your first UPI payment. You will miss the reward if you wait.

How do I use the recharge voucher?
Go to the recharge screen. Pick your plan. The ₹50 discount will show up in the promo code section.

Keywords: paytm referral code, paytm refer and earn, paytm cashback promo code, paytm invite code 2026, paytm 50 recharge free, how to get paytm cashback, paytm upi offer, 7355791064

item.title: Paytm Referral Code 7355791064 - Get ₹100 Cashback + ₹50 Free Recharge

And he gave me this code. I used it while making my account. Then I sent ₹10 to my brother. I got a flat cashback in my bank account right away. I also got a free ₹50 mobile recharge voucher. It actually worked.

  3. Apply the Code: Go to the invite section. Paste 7355791064 before you do anything else.

  • Cashback I Got: ₹75

  • Total Saved: ₹125

I spent ₹10 and got ₹125 in value. I did this on a Sunday night. The money went straight into my SBI account in two seconds. It helped me pay for my data pack.

Does the Paytm referral code 7355791064 work?
Yes. I tested it on July 2, 2026 and received the cashback right away.

No. You need to apply it before your first UPI payment. You will miss the reward if you wait.

How do I use the recharge voucher?
Go to the recharge screen. Pick your plan. The ₹50 discount will show up in the promo code section.

Keywords: paytm referral code, paytm refer and earn, paytm cashback promo code, paytm invite code 2026, paytm 50 recharge free, how to get paytm cashback, paytm upi offer, 7355791064
